ingredients.description: Jazz chord voicings on FMRhodes2 with FM modulation index control
Shiloh vocal sample with delay and reverb for atmosphere
MIDI-controlled delay wet amount on vocal sample
MIDI button doubles kick speed for dynamic energy shifts
165 BPM half-time breaks, jungle_breaks:13 with loopAt variations
bassWarsaw riff with sustained notes and chromatic tension
Chopped jungle break on d3 with loopAt 2 and ply variations
Bitcrush on bass creating gritty texture
Multi-level ply for snare rolls controlled by MIDI
165 BPM, jungle_vocals on d10, FMRhodes2 with modIndex
Custom multi-sample bass with crush and octer modulation
Extended snare pattern with accelerating fills across 20 cycles
Bitcrush on come_bass creating distorted sub textures
MIDI-conditional voice sample buildup
170 BPM half-time, come_eguitar + come_voice samples, call-and-response
Gameboy-era bass sample chopped and looped

80 BPM ambient piece with LPF automation over 64 cycles
Atari drum machine sample chopped at 32 subdivisions

Full-range FM modulation on Rhodes creating metallic timbres
Multi-offset echo technique creating rhythmic canon (THE RAIN)
120 BPM, thematic orbits named THE ROAD/FUEL/GUIDELINES/THUNDER/RAIN
Atari drum machine samples driving the main beat

Bitcrush on 90s_synatm pad synth
Accelerating chop granularity for builds

Long sustained bass notes with brief melodic pickups (Basse Germanique)
Four-layer kick stack for heavy four-on-the-floor
Leslie speaker effect on moogBass creating rotary modulation
